    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Boolean
    CourseSecurity.baseHasManagePermissions(org.springframework.security.access.expression.method.MethodSecurityExpressionOperations operations, Course course)
    This is a helper method that checks if the current user has management permissions for the given course.
